detectors.description:
GPHToken.setOwner(address)._newOwner (GPHToken.sol#629) lacks a zero-check on :

Reentrancy in GPHToken.refundTokens(address,address,uint256) (GPHToken.sol#709-721):
	External calls:
	- token.transfer(_refund,_value) (GPHToken.sol#717)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- RefundTokens(_token,_refund,_value) (GPHToken.sol#719)

detectors.description:

	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow

	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2

	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.23 (GPHToken.sol#1)
